Climatisation régulée Redesign P0 X84 Série

OBD Information

Protocol: CAN
Send ID: 744
Recv ID: 764
Baudrate: 10400
Func Addr: 29
Func Name: Climatisation

  {
    "diagversion": "68",
    "supplier": "042",
    "soft": "0011",
    "version": "0201"
